renames.rationale: Small helper calling _Wcrtomb; likely a single-codepoint wchar->mb conversion routine.
Larger sibling of 140002aa0 calling _Wcrtomb; likely loops over a wide string converting to multibyte.
Sole caller is FUN_140002cd0 which xrefs ios_base::failbit/badbit/eofbit strings; builds the exception object before throw.
Xrefs 'ios_base::badbit/eofbit/failbit set' strings and calls _CxxThrowException via helper FUN_140002c10; classic MSVC _Xfailure.
Single forwarder to __std_exception_copy; matches std::exception copy-ctor shape.
Calls operator_new, _Init, _guard_dispatch_icall; many callers; constructs a stream/ios-like object with vtable dispatch.
Thin wrapper that forwards to FUN_140003090 (likely the real ctor) with shared callers; sole caller FUN_1400151c0.
Calls _Ios_base_dtor; shares many callers with StreamObjectCtor (140002e10), suggesting paired ctor/dtor.
8-instruction forwarder to FUN_140002e10 (StreamObjectCtor); likely a default-args trampoline.
2-instruction stub returning constant 'win_error' string; classic std::error_category::name() override.
Calls FormatMessageA plus operator_new and string helpers; large (288 insns) string-building routine for Win32 error codes.
Calls GetLastError and forwards to FUN_140001ee0; multiple Win32-API-using callers (FUN_140006670 etc.) consume its result.
Xrefs 'GetModuleFileName failed' string and forwards to FUN_140001ee0 (likely the logger); pure failure-path reporter.
Shares callee shape with FUN_140002c10 (FUN_140001c20 + FUN_140035d28 + FUN_1400106a0); many error-path callers including FUN_140003730 area.
Calls LoadLibraryW then GetLastError; small wrapper used by FUN_140005f40 and FUN_140012190 to load a DLL with error capture.
11-instruction single forwarder to FreeLibrary; only one caller FUN_140057200.
